notes: Each eval drives the axon4to5-migrate skill with the saga recipe in single mode. Coverage: simple saga to @Component+JPA state (no deadline → Success), saga with DeadlineManager → Blocker B1 with partial migration (saga structure done, deadline code commented out — applies to both native and spring configs), and a rejected non-saga (aggregate). Fixtures live in evals/fixtures/synthetic/ and evals/fixtures/axon4/heroes/.

evals.name: spring-simple-saga-to-component
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. PaymentSaga.java is an AF4 saga: @Saga, @StartSaga + @SagaEventHandler(associationProperty = "paymentId"), @EndSaga + @SagaEventHandler, field CommandGateway (transient @Autowired), field paymentId. Apply the saga recipe: (1) replace @Saga with @Component @DisallowReplay; (2) create PaymentState.java (@Entity with @Id String paymentId, Status enum PENDING/COMPLETED, long timestamp, no-arg + all-args constructors, accessors); (3) create PaymentStateRepository.java (JpaRepository<PaymentState, String>); (4) rewrite @SagaEventHandler methods to @EventHandler — start handler saves new PaymentState + dispatches via CommandDispatcher parameter, end handler updates state status; (5) remove @Autowired field CommandGateway (replace with CommandDispatcher method param); (6) remove all saga imports. Create the two new files next to PaymentSaga in the same outputs/ directory. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: PaymentSaga rewritten to @Component @DisallowReplay + @EventHandler; PaymentState.java and PaymentStateRepository.java created; Result: ✅ Success.
expectations: Result block marks Success with axon4to5-saga

evals.name: native-saga-deadline-blocker-partial
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=native mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. PaymentSagaWithDeadline.java is an AF4 saga with DeadlineManager + @DeadlineHandler. The saga recipe detects B1 (DeadlineManager present — applies to ALL configs including native). Apply partial migration first: (1) replace @Saga with @Component @DisallowReplay; (2) create PaymentSagaWithDeadlineState.java (@Entity) and PaymentSagaWithDeadlineStateRepository.java (JpaRepository) in outputs/; (3) rewrite @SagaEventHandler to @EventHandler with repository lookups; (4) COMMENT OUT the DeadlineManager field with 'TODO AF5: DeadlineManager removed'; (5) COMMENT OUT deadlineManager.schedule(...) call sites with TODO; (6) COMMENT OUT the entire @DeadlineHandler method with TODO; (7) keep DeadlineManager imports as comments. Then emit Blocker B1. Do NOT delete deadline code — comment it out. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Partial migration applied (@Component, @EventHandler done; deadline code commented out); Result: 🚧 Blocker B1.
expectations: DeadlineManager still present as comment (not deleted)

evals.name: spring-saga-deadline-blocker-partial
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. PaymentSagaWithDeadline.java is an AF4 saga with DeadlineManager + @DeadlineHandler. The saga recipe detects B1 (DeadlineManager present). Apply partial migration first: (1) replace @Saga with @Component @DisallowReplay; (2) create PaymentSagaWithDeadlineState.java and PaymentSagaWithDeadlineStateRepository.java in outputs/; (3) rewrite @SagaEventHandler to @EventHandler with repository lookups; (4) COMMENT OUT the DeadlineManager field with 'TODO AF5: DeadlineManager removed — design replacement (e.g. @Scheduled poller on state entity)'; (5) COMMENT OUT deadlineManager.schedule(...) call sites with TODO; (6) COMMENT OUT the entire @DeadlineHandler method block with TODO; (7) keep DeadlineManager imports as comments. Do NOT add @Scheduled — that is the caller's decision. Then emit Blocker B1 with Options (skip/revert/solve-manually). Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Partial migration applied (@Component, @EventHandler done; deadline code commented out); Result: 🚧 Blocker B1.
expectations: DeadlineManager still in file as comment (not deleted)

evals.name: aggregate-rejected
evals.prompt: Invoke axon4to5-migrate at $SKILL_DIR with `framework=axoniq configuration=spring mode=single source=$SOURCE skip-openrewrite=true`. Calendar.java is an event-sourced aggregate (@Aggregate + @EventSourcingHandler). The saga recipe's Applicable predicate 1 must reject it. Source MUST stay byte-identical — no @Component, no @DisallowReplay, no @EventHandler AF5 import, no state entity created. Copy the Result block to $WORKSPACE/result.md.
evals.expected_output: Aggregate rejected by predicate 1; source untouched; Result: ⏭️ Rejected with route to aggregate recipe.
expectations: Notes name aggregate as the routing target

assertions.text: Notes name aggregate as routing target
